name: J1939TestNmtQueryAddress
title: J1939TestNmtQueryAddress
syntax: long J1939TestNmtQueryAddress( char deviceName[8], dword componentMask );
description: The function queries for an ECU address.

parameters.name: deviceName
parameters.description: device name of the ECU to query for

parameters.name: componentMask
parameters.description: Bit field with the valid components of the Device Name: 0x001: Arbitrary Address Capable 0x002: Industry Group 0x004: Vehicle System Instance 0x008: Vehicle System 0x010: Function 0x020: Function Instance 0x040: ECU Instance 0x080: Manufacturer Code 0x100: Identity Number

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
